headline: DuPont Achieves Renewable Power Milestone in US Healthcare Sites
summary: DuPont's U.S. healthcare manufacturing sites now run on renewable electricity, advancing climate goals and lowering emissions.

raw.headline: DuPont Achieves Renewable Power Milestone in US Healthcare Sites
raw.summary: DuPont's U.S. healthcare manufacturing sites now run on renewable electricity, advancing climate goals and lowering emissions.

headline: ATI and BWX Technologies Extend Strategic Partnership Through 2030
summary: ATI extends its strategic material supply agreement with BWXT through fiscal 2030, supporting the U.S. Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program.

raw.headline: ATI and BWX Technologies Extend Strategic Partnership Through 2030
raw.summary: ATI extends its strategic material supply agreement with BWXT through fiscal 2030, supporting the U.S. Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program.

headline: BHP Advances Lower-Carbon Conveyor Solutions With BOTON Partnership
summary: BHP Group teams up with BOTON to develop smart, lower-carbon mining conveyor technologies, from AI belt systems to lifecycle carbon tracking.

raw.headline: BHP Advances Lower-Carbon Conveyor Solutions With BOTON Partnership
